name: African Vegetarian Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and chop the kohlrabies into chunks.
2. Chop the onion, peel and chunk the sweet potatoes, slice the zucchini thickly.
3. Rinse 5 fresh tomatoes (or use 16 oz canned) and garbanzo beans with liquid.
4. Cook couscous or bulgar wheat according to package instructions.
5. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan over medium heat.
6. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, about 30 minutes.
7. Stir in raisins, ground coriander, turmeric, cinnamon, ginger, cumin, and water.
8. If desired, serve couscous separately.
